description: Resy reservation management — search, book, cancel, favorites, and Priority Notify for Claude
name: io.github.chrischall/resy-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Your Resy account email. Optional — leave unset to use the fetchproxy browser bridge instead.
environmentVariables.name: RESY_EMAIL

environmentVariables.description: Your Resy account password. Optional — leave unset to use the fetchproxy browser bridge instead.
environmentVariables.name: RESY_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Pre-obtained x-resy-auth-token. Overrides email/password and the fetchproxy bridge. Power users / CI only.
environmentVariables.name: RESY_AUTH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to disable the fetchproxy fallback (forces RESY_EMAIL+PASSWORD or RESY_AUTH_TOKEN).
environmentVariables.name: RESY_DISABLE_FETCHPROXY

environmentVariables.description: Override the public web-app API key (rarely needed)
environmentVariables.name: RESY_API_KEY
